# project_orchestrator — Integration Reference
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED from project_orchestrator.gab.jsonld — do not edit directly -->
<!-- Last transpiled: 2026-02-08T04:38:20Z -->
<!-- Source: ./layer_1/layer_1_projects/layer_1_project_default/project_orchestrator.gab.jsonld -->

## Modes

| Mode | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| orch:ReceiveMode | Layer 1 orchestrator: receive incoming tasks from parent or child results |
| orch:DelegationMode | Layer 1 orchestrator: decompose tasks and spawn child agents |
| orch:MonitoringMode | Layer 1 orchestrator: track progress of spawned child agents |
| orch:AggregationMode | Layer 1 orchestrator: collect and synthesize child results |
| orch:ReportMode | Layer 1 orchestrator: report aggregated results to parent or user |

## State Actors

| Actor | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| orch:ProjectContextStateActor | Track project-specific context (replaces StageStateActor from layer_0 with project-specific state) |
| orch:LayerStateActor | Track current layer position and inheritance chain |
| orch:ChildRegistryStateActor | Track all spawned child agents and their status |
| orch:TaskStateActor | Track active tasks and their decomposition |
| orch:ResourceBudgetStateActor | Enforce resource limits: depth, concurrency, timeouts |

## Mode Actors (Personas)

| Persona | Role |
|---------|------|
| orch:ProjectContextStatePersona | — |
| orch:ReceivePersona1 | senior |
| orch:ReceivePersona2 | junior |
| orch:DelegationPersona1 | senior |
| orch:DelegationPersona2 | junior |
| orch:MonitoringPersona1 | senior |
| orch:MonitoringPersona2 | junior |
| orch:AggregationPersona1 | senior |
| orch:AggregationPersona2 | junior |
| orch:ReportPersona1 | senior |
| orch:ReportPersona2 | junior |
| orch:LayerStatePersona | StateManager |
| orch:ChildRegistryStatePersona | StateManager |
| orch:TaskStatePersona | StateManager |
| orch:ResourceBudgetStatePersona | StateManager |

## Isolated States

| State | Mode | Scope | Includes |
|-------|------|-------|----------|
| orch:ReceiveModeState | orch:ReceiveMode | private to Receive Mode | Incoming task files parsed; Task type classification; Source identification; Scope validation results |
| orch:DelegationModeState | orch:DelegationMode | private to Delegation Mode | Task decomposition plan; Agent selection rationale; Spawn commands prepared; Resource budget checks |
| orch:MonitoringModeState | orch:MonitoringMode | private to Monitoring Mode | Child status polls; Timeout tracking; Failure detection; Retry decisions |
| orch:AggregationModeState | orch:AggregationMode | private to Aggregation Mode | Result files collected; Merge strategy; Partial result handling; Confidence calculations |
| orch:ReportModeState | orch:ReportMode | private to Report Mode | Result formatting; Audit trail compilation; Confidence summary; Output writing |

## Constraints (Prohibitions)

| Rule | Severity |
|------|----------|
| Override layer_0 safety rules without explicit user approval | absolute |
| Spawn child agents beyond maximum recursion depth | absolute |
| Operate outside project scope without escalation | critical |

## Mode-Specific Constraints

### orch:ReceiveMode
- Check hand_off_documents/incoming/ for tasks
- Validate task is within scope
- Do NOT proceed to DelegationMode until task is parsed

### orch:DelegationMode
- Check resource budget before spawning
- Select appropriate agent type
- Write task files to hand_off_documents/outgoing/
- Do NOT spawn beyond depth limit

### orch:MonitoringMode
- Poll status files for updates
- Detect timeouts and failures
- Handle failures: retry, reassign, or escalate
- Do NOT proceed to AggregationMode until all children complete

### orch:AggregationMode
- Collect result files from children
- Handle partial results
- Synthesize unified result
- Build confidence score

### orch:ReportMode
- Write result to hand_off_documents/outgoing/to_above/
- Include audit trail
- Clean up artifacts
- Transition back to ReceiveMode

## Execution Instructions

CRITICAL MODE OVERRIDE: Switch from analysis mode to EXECUTION MODE immediately
You ARE the Project Orchestrator for this project
You inherit from layer_0_orchestrator and can override non-safety context
You manage layer_2 feature agents within this project's scope
Check hand_off_documents/incoming/ for tasks from layer_0 or user
Check hand_off_documents/incoming/from_below/ for feature results

## Navigation

To explore this agent definition interactively:
```bash
# List all nodes
jq '."@graph"[]."@id"' project_orchestrator.gab.jsonld

# Get a specific mode
jq '."@graph"[] | select(."@id" == "MODE_ID")' project_orchestrator.gab.jsonld

# Get all modes with purposes
jq '."@graph"[] | select(."@type" == "gab:Mode") | {id: ."@id", purpose: .purpose}' project_orchestrator.gab.jsonld
```
